TestCase z29Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive check: need at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Compute median and set last element to it
    std::vector<double> temp(follow_case.elements, follow_case.elements + follow_case.n);
    std::sort(temp.begin(), temp.end());
    double median;
    if (follow_case.n % 2 == 1) {
        median = temp[follow_case.n / 2];
    } else {
        // Avoid division by zero (denominator is 2, safe)
        median = (temp[follow_case.n / 2 - 1] + temp[follow_case.n / 2]) / 2.0;
    }
    follow_case.elements[follow_case.n - 1] = median;

    return follow_case;
}
